notes: Fully implemented with 393 test lines, roundtrip verified, production-proven. Emits CLAUDE.md, .mcp.json, settings.json patch, skills/, agents/.
Complete with unique httpUrl handling, 277 test lines, roundtrip tested. Emits GEMINI.md, settings.json, agents/, policy TOML.
Mature with per-file .mdc rules, 591 test lines, excellent roundtrip coverage. Emits rules/, mcp.json, agents/, hooks.json, cli.json.
Works but TOML serialization uses JSON workaround. No hooks support (intentional per feature matrix). 353 test lines, roundtrip tested but TOML round-conversion may have gaps.
Implemented: opencode.json, AGENTS.md, .opencode/skills/. Less real-world validated than Claude/Cursor. Agents defined inline. 348 test lines, roundtrip tested.
Rock-solid resolve.rs handles merging, overrides, and modes flawlessly. Core of the compilation pipeline.
Provider-aware with all transport types, edge case handling, 283 test lines. Per-provider URL field names and transport detection.
Robust Minijinja template resolution with variable/env handling, 370 test lines. Skills compiled to provider-specific SKILL.md paths.
Complete provider-native format compilation, 261 test lines. Claude MD, Gemini MD, Cursor MD, Codex TOML.
Comprehensive multi-provider translation with 12K test file. Claude settings.json, Gemini policy TOML, Cursor cli.json.
Event type translation validated, 363 test lines. Claude settings.json, Gemini settings.json, Cursor hooks.json, Codex hooks.json.
Simple but solid pass-through, 35 test lines. Plugin install intent compiled as manifest artifact for CLI execution.
Code exists (150 lines) but not exposed in WASM CompileResult. Never serialized to JS. Studio integration path unclear. Needs real actor spawn testing.
Builds cleanly via wasm-pack, all 5 providers exposed, output matches native. Browser-side compilation in Studio works.
Spec written but NOT IMPLEMENTED. MCP command/url unchecked. Agent skill refs unvalidated. Permission regex patterns unchecked. Only package name validation exists.

WASM errors are flat JsValue strings with no structure. Native resolve errors lack file/line context. Template resolution falls back silently with eprintln(). Spec written but only package validation implemented.
Roundtrip tests exist (337 lines) but incomplete: missing full agent profile preservation, Codex TOML field completeness, OpenCode agent inline preservation. Silent field drops possible.
Field exists in CompileResult but never reaches JavaScript. Event subscription metadata not exposed to Studio.
Zero documentation. Adding a provider requires reading existing code. No guide for descriptor/compile/decompile/tests/feature flags.
No architecture. Providers statically compiled. Would need dynamic loading, plugin API, sandboxing.
